title: ‘Game Changer’? Too Soon to Tell. But Ukraine Flexed in Striking Moscow.
summary_full: The drone attack that sent plumes of smoke rising over Moscow intensified Ukrainian hopes of bringing the war to Russia.
summary_public: The drone attack that sent plumes of smoke rising over Moscow intensified Ukrainian hopes of bringing the war to Russia.

UA.label: positive
